# 设计模式与软件工程基础面试题

> 模拟真实面试场景，训练对设计模式和软件工程原则的思考与表达。

---


## 一、基础题

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q1" title="1. 什么是 SOLID 原则？请结合前端场景分别说明。" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fop6Pph4ogU09MSUQg5LqU5Liq5Y6f5YiZ55qE5ZCr5LmJ77yM5bm257uT5ZCI5YmN56uv5byA5Y+R55qE5a6e6ZmF5Zy65pmv5Li+5L6L6K+05piO5q+P5Liq5Y6f5YiZ5aaC5L2V5bqU55So44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q2" title="2. 单例模式有什么优缺点？在前端中如何正确实现？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fliIbmnpDljZXkvovmqKHlvI/nmoTkvJjnvLrngrnvvIzlubbnu5nlh7rlnKjliY3nq6/lnLrmma/kuIvnmoTmnIDkvbPlrp7ot7Xlrp7njrDmlrnlvI/jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q3" title="3. 观察者模式和发布订阅模式有什么区别？分别在什么场景下使用？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fku47nu5PmnoTjgIHogKblkIjluqbjgIHlrp7njrDmlrnlvI/kuInkuKrnu7Tluqblr7nmr5Top4Llr5/ogIXmqKHlvI/lkozlj5HluIPorqLpmIXmqKHlvI/nmoTlvILlkIzjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q4" title="4. 简单工厂、工厂方法和抽象工厂有什么区别？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7flr7nmr5TkuInnp43lt6XljoLmqKHlvI/nmoTlvILlkIzvvIzlubbnu5nlh7rliY3nq6/lvIDlj5HkuK3nmoTlrp7pmYXlupTnlKjlnLrmma/jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q5" title="5. 装饰器模式（Decorator）和代理模式（Proxy）有什么区别？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fku47mhI/lm77jgIHnu5PmnoTjgIHlrp7njrDkuInkuKrnu7Tluqblr7nmr5Too4XppbDlmajmqKHlvI/lkozku6PnkIbmqKHlvI/vvIzlubbnu5nlh7rliY3nq6/lrp7pmYXlupTnlKjjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

## 二、进阶题

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q6" title="6. 如何在前端设计一个可扩展的插件系统？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrmj5Lku7bns7vnu5/mnrbmnoTvvIzmlK/mjIHmj5Lku7bms6jlhozjgIHnlJ/lkb3lkajmnJ/nrqHnkIblkozkvp3otZbnrqHnkIbvvIznu5nlh7rmoLjlv4PmjqXlj6PlrprkuYnlkozlrp7njrDjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q7" title="7. 实现一个类型安全的 EventEmitter。" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7flrp7njrDkuIDkuKogRXZlbnRFbWl0dGVy77yM5pSv5oyBIG9u44CBb2Zm44CBZW1pdOOAgW9uY2Ug5pa55rOV77yM5bm25o+Q5L6bIFR5cGVTY3JpcHQg57G75Z6L5a6J5YWo5pSv5oyB44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q8" title="8. 如何设计一个通用中间件链（Middleware Chain）？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrkuK3pl7Tku7bpk77ns7vnu5/vvIzmlK/mjIHlvILmraXkuK3pl7Tku7bnmoTpobrluo/miafooYzjgIHplJnor6/kvKDmkq3lkozkuIrkuIvmlofkvKDpgJLvvIzlj4LogIMgRXhwcmVzcy9Lb2Eg55qE6K6+6K6h44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q9" title="9. 设计一个可扩展的表单验证架构。" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrliY3nq6/ooajljZXpqozor4Hns7vnu5/vvIzmlK/mjIHlo7DmmI7lvI/op4TliJnjgIHoh6rlrprkuYnpqozor4HlmajjgIHlvILmraXpqozor4HlkozplJnor6/mtojmga/nrqHnkIbjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q10" title="10. 设计一个支持撤销（Undo）和重做（Redo）的系统。" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrmkqTplIAv6YeN5YGa57O757uf77yM5pSv5oyB5ZG95Luk5qih5byP44CB54q25oCB5b+r54Wn44CB5om56YeP5pON5L2c5ZKM5YaF5a2Y566h55CG44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q11" title="11. 实现一个简单的状态管理库，分析其设计模式。" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fkvaDku47pm7blrp7njrDkuIDkuKrnsbsgUmVkdXgg55qE54q25oCB566h55CG5bqT77yI5YyF5ZCrIFN0b3Jl44CBUmVkdWNlcuOAgU1pZGRsZXdhcmXvvInvvIzlubbliIbmnpDlhbbkuK3nlKjliLDnmoTorr7orqHmqKHlvI/jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q12" title="12. 如何在前端项目中实现依赖注入（Dependency Injection）？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrliY3nq6/kvp3otZbms6jlhaXlrrnlmajvvIzmlK/mjIHmnI3liqHms6jlhozjgIHop6PmnpDjgIHnlJ/lkb3lkajmnJ/nrqHnkIblkozkvZznlKjln5/mjqfliLbjgILliIbmnpAgUmVhY3Qg5Lit5aaC5L2V5a6e546wIERJ44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q13" title="13. 设计一个支持拦截器的 API Client。" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrliY3nq68gSFRUUCDlrqLmiLfnq6/vvIzmlK/mjIHor7fmsYIv5ZON5bqU5oum5oiq5Zmo44CB6K+35rGC6YeN6K+V44CB6LaF5pe25o6n5Yi244CB6K+35rGC5Y+W5raI5ZKM6ZSZ6K+v57uf5LiA5aSE55CG44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q14" title="14. 什么时候应该使用策略模式？请结合前端场景举例。" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fop6Pph4rnrZbnlaXmqKHlvI/nmoTmoLjlv4PmgJ3mg7PvvIzor7TmmI7lnKjliY3nq6/kuK3lk6rkupvlnLrmma/pgILlkIjkvb/nlKjnrZbnlaXmqKHlvI/vvIzlubbnu5nlh7rku6PnoIHlrp7njrDjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q15" title="15. 如何理解&quot;组合优于继承&quot;（Composition over Inheritance）？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fop6Pph4rkuLrku4DkuYjnu4TlkIjkvJjkuo7nu6fmib/vvIzlr7nmr5TkuKTogIXnmoTkvJjnvLrngrnvvIzlubbnu5nlh7rliY3nq6/lvIDlj5HkuK3nmoTlrp7pmYXmoYjkvovjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

## 三、高级题

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q16" title="16. 设计一个低代码引擎的插件架构。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrkvY7ku6PnoIHlvJXmk47nmoTmj5Lku7bns7vnu5/mnrbmnoTvvIzmtrXnm5bnu4Tku7bms6jlhozjgIHmi5bmi73muLLmn5PjgIHlsZ7mgKfpnaLmnb/mianlsZXjgIHpobXpnaLnlJ/lkb3lkajmnJ/nrYnmlrnpnaLjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q17" title="17. 微前端架构中主子应用如何通信？有哪些模式？" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fliIbmnpDlvq7liY3nq6/mnrbmnoTkuK3kuLvlupTnlKjlkozlrZDlupTnlKjkuYvpl7TjgIHlrZDlupTnlKjlkozlrZDlupTnlKjkuYvpl7TnmoTpgJrkv6HmqKHlvI/vvIzlr7nmr5TlkITnp43mlrnmoYjnmoTkvJjliqPjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q18" title="18. 设计一个设计系统（Design System）的 Token 管线。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrlrozmlbTnmoTorr7orqEgVG9rZW4g5L2T57O777yM5LuO6K6+6K6h56i/5Yiw5YmN56uv5Luj56CB55qE6Ieq5Yqo5YyW566h57q/77yM5YyF5ousIFRva2VuIOWumuS5ieOAgeWIhuexu+OAgei9rOaNouWSjOa2iOi0ueOAgjwvcD4K" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q19" title="19. 设计一个前端 A/B Testing 基础设施。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrliY3nq68gQS9CIOa1i+ivleezu+e7n++8jOaUr+aMgeWunumqjOWIhue7hOOAgea1gemHj+WIhumFjeOAgeWfi+eCueS4iuaKpeOAgeaVsOaNruWIhuaekOWSjOWKqOaAgeWKoOi9veWunumqjOaWueahiOOAgjwvcD4K" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q20" title="20. 设计实时协同编辑的架构（Collaborative Editing）。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrlpJrkurrlrp7ml7bljY/lkIznvJbovpHnmoTliY3nq6/mnrbmnoTvvIzmr5TovoMgT1TvvIhPcGVyYXRpb25hbCBUcmFuc2Zvcm1hdGlvbu+8ieWSjCBDUkRU77yIQ29uZmxpY3QtZnJlZSBSZXBsaWNhdGVkIERhdGEgVHlwZXPvvInkuKTnp43mlrnmoYjjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q21" title="21. 设计一个前端错误边界（Error Boundary）和自动重试架构。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrliY3nq6/lrrnplJnmnrbmnoTvvIzmlK/mjIHnu4Tku7bnuqfliKvnmoTplJnor6/mjZXojrfjgIHoh6rliqjph43or5XjgIHpmY3nuqflsZXnpLrlkozplJnor6/mgaLlpI3jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q22" title="22. SSR 流式渲染架构设计（Streaming SSR）。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKogU1NSIOa1geW8j+a4suafk+aetuaehO+8jOaUr+aMgSBTdXNwZW5zZSDmtYHlvI/kvKDovpPjgIHliIblnZfliqDovb3jgIHpmY3nuqfnrZbnlaXlkozmgKfog73kvJjljJbjgILph43ngrnliIbmnpAgUmVhY3QgMTgg55qEIFN0cmVhbWluZyBTU1Ig5a6e546w44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q23" title="23. 设计一个可扩展的前端权限系统。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7forr7orqHkuIDkuKrliY3nq6/mnYPpmZDnrqHnkIbns7vnu5/vvIzmlK/mjIHop5LoibIt5p2D6ZmQ5qih5Z6L44CB57uE5Lu257qn5p2D6ZmQ5o6n5Yi244CB6Lev55Sx57qn5p2D6ZmQ5o6n5Yi244CB5Yqo5oCB5p2D6ZmQ6YWN572u44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="design-patterns-interview-q24" title="24. 如何在前端项目中系统化推动重构？" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popg8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fmj4/ov7DkuIDlpZfns7vnu5/ljJbnmoTliY3nq6/ph43mnoTmlrnms5XorrrvvIzljIXmi6zlpoLkvZXor4bliKvku6PnoIHlnY/lkbPpgZPjgIHliLblrprph43mnoTorqHliJLjgIHkv53or4Hph43mnoTlronlhajku6Xlj4rmjqjov5vlm6LpmJ/okL3lnLDjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />
